title: F1 — Collapse the deprecated derived TOOL_EMOJI / PRIMARY_ARG_KEY maps and getToolEmoji
technique: T16 collapse premature/duplicate abstraction (DE-abstraction) via M02 expand/contract

title: F4 — Redirect leaky getToolEmoji internal call site to resolveToolPresenter(name,{}).emoji
technique: T07 align interface to usage (redirect internal call to canonical resolver) + char-test rung

title: T07 — Narrow the over-broad public re-export surface of index.ts
technique: T07 narrow leaky interface via M02 expand/contract

title: F5 — admissionLabelFromResponse if-chain → table-driven dispatch
technique: T19 conditional → dispatch (ordered rule list)

title: F2 — Remove `attachOpenAiRuntime` pure pass-through middle-man
technique: [T23] remove middle man / collapse pass-through; delete the function + its `cli.ts` re-export and repoint `cli.test.ts` onto `attachWithRetry`

title: F3 — Hand-rolled `parseArgv` flag loop duplicates intent across two monitor commands
technique: [T15] extract the shared `--name value`/`--name=value` matcher (matchStringFlag + the two integer parsers) into a private `monitor-args.ts` consumed by `parseWaitArgs`; keep error bytes identical; do NOT fold in `cli/argv.ts`'s `parseFlag`

title: F4 — Event-filter predicate is encoded three times
technique: [T15]/[T21] introduce `normalizeEventFilterSpec(args) → FilterSpec | undefined` once and derive the active-flag, the in-memory predicate, and the store-filter from that single object (preserve both consumers' existence — the in-memory predicate is a deliberate redundant guard)

title: F4 — Parallel switch(condition) dispatch tables (evaluateStartSnapshot / evaluateEvent) must be kept congruent
technique: [T19] conditional -> dispatch: per-condition strategy record { start, event } keyed by HrcMonitorCondition with `satisfies Record<HrcMonitorCondition, ...>`

title: F5 — protectStreamCursor Proxy: 25 lines of get/set/defineProperty traps to make one numeric field read-only
technique: [T16] collapse premature abstraction: replace Proxy with Object.defineProperty({writable:false}) on streamCursorSeq, gated by a new char-test

title: Public type surface (index.ts) — ~150 exported wire/RPC contract types are deliberately wide; any [T07] narrowing or [M02] shape change is a breaking change for 180+ downstream consumers across 5 packages (several consume built dist/*.d.ts)
file: packages/hrc-core/src/index.ts (re-exports of contracts.ts, http-contracts.ts, hrcchat-contracts.ts, monitor/*, errors.ts, selectors.ts)
technique: [M02] expand/contract migration (additive-optional only), NOT in-place narrowing

title: F1 [T10] Reify the implicit assistant-segment state machine
technique: extract missing abstraction (AssistantSegmentBuffer with startMessage/appendDelta/replaceBody/closeActive owning assistantSegments + activeAssistantSegmentId + currentAssistantMessageRef)

title: F3 [T22] Guard-clause / hoist the repeated `if (!runId) break` per-case prologue
technique: collapse/flatten nesting — resolve effective runId once before the switch (or pass resolved run into per-event handlers)

title: F5 [T16] `hrcLifecycleEventToSessionEnvelope` alias is a pure pass-through of `adaptHrcLifecycleEvent`
technique: remove middle man / collapse duplicate public name

title: F6 [T15] Hoist the `isRecord(payload) ? payload : {}` record-guard across adapt* functions
technique: extract small private helper recordOrEmpty(payload) applied uniformly across adapters (preserving per-function sentinel semantics)

title: F7 [T01] `createLogger` re-reads `process.env['LOG_LEVEL']` on every write
technique: seam — compute threshold once at createLogger time, or accept an optional level field in the arg object

title: T07 narrow leaky boundary — onRender 5th arg `run: RunState`
technique: narrow exported callback signature (drop run: RunState param) after confirming no external consumer

title: T16 collapse speculative generality — sink metadata + onRunQueued callback + unused helper/type exports
file: packages/hrc-frame-render/src/session-events-manager.ts:799-957 (setSinkMetadata 888-896, getRunState 880-882, onRunQueued 799/804/923-925, sinkMetadata field types.ts/index.ts) + hrc-event-adapter.ts:51 canonicalSessionRefFromEvent + Gateway*Event/PermissionAction/RunId/ProjectId exports
technique: surface narrowing — remove unconsumed exports/ctor params/fields after confirming zero external consumers (expand/contract migration)

title: sendInFlightInput manual spread duplicates deprecated input/prompt plumbing
technique: B/M02 contract contraction (collapse dual input/prompt to canonical prompt across releases)

title: getStatus/listTargets/watch repeat the `? 'true' : undefined` boolean-flag idiom, inconsistent with buildPath's String(boolean)
technique: C/T15 extract a `boolField` helper after confirming server parsing for status/targets/runtimes flags

title: F1 — Contract narrowing: drop unused repository-class value exports from index.ts
technique: DE-abstraction / M02 expand-contract on the published interface

title: F2 — Remove middle man: collapse the repositories.ts re-export barrel
file: packages/hrc-store-sqlite/src/repositories.ts:1-70 (consumed by database.ts:28, index.ts:16/25, and two in-package tests)
technique: DE-abstraction (remove pass-through barrel; rewire imports to ./repositories/*.js)

title: F4 — Two-tier nullable-transform inconsistency in patch specs
technique: simplify (drop redundant transform) — per-column patch-type audit + char-test asserting null still writes NULL

title: F6 — findByHostSessionId is a pure alias of getByHostSessionId
technique: dedup synonym method + update hrc-cli call site to getByHostSessionId

title: Divergent duplicate isTurnEnd (two definitions, different semantics)
technique: T15 extract missing abstraction (single terminal-event predicate into stacked-shared.ts/event-kinds.ts)

apiImpact: internal-only (exit codes 1/4/5/etc are the user-facing CLI contract)
title: Repeated aggregator.finish(...) + throw TurnExitError terminal blocks
technique: T19 conditional → dispatch table + single finalizeTurn(kind) helper

title: extractTaskId / task-id parsing duplicated across modules
technique: T03 relocate by affinity (shared taskId.ts exposing taskIdFromScope + taskIdFromSessionRef)

title: F3 — checkPreStartDriverCapabilities ~= checkInvocationCapabilities near-duplication
technique: extract shared checkCommonCapabilities(missing, requirements, caps) for the 11 identical checkNeed calls; keep the 2 divergent arms in each caller

title: F6 — markStartedInvocationFailed/failReplayStale/markBrokerCrashTerminal repeat the runtimeStateJson spread-and-stamp
technique: extract applyTerminalRuntimeState(db, runtime, {status, now, diagnostic}) preserving the exact per-call field set

title: F5 — isRecord type-guard triplicated across the module
technique: export one isRecord from a single leaf (event-mapper/helpers.ts or a new broker/json.ts) and import it

title: F7 — connectDurableBrokerWithRetry 'unreachable' final throw (partial->total)
technique: re-express as for(attempt of 1..max-1){retry}; return await lastAttempt() to make totality compiler-evident

title: DF-1 — notActive check widening: awaited RPC can resolve against a since-deleted active record (concurrency)
technique: re-validate active ownership after the await, or hold a per-runtime ownership token across the RPC

title: DF-2 — duplicated durable broker endpoint type across the module
technique: consolidate the endpoint type into one source and re-point runtime-hosting/runtime-state imports

title: Finding 1 [T16]: collapse premature abstraction — un-export the two single-caller broker-profile predicates
technique: DE-abstraction: drop export to make module-private (or inline into isBrokerControllerProfile)

title: Finding 2 [T15]: extract the `...(x !== undefined ? { x } : {})` optional-spread idiom into an optional() helper
technique: extract a tiny optional<K,V>(k,v) helper preserving the exact-field-set (key absent when undefined) invariant

title: Finding 3 [T17]: toFrontend silently coerces unknown frontends to 'agent-sdk'
technique: partial→total: emit/throw on unexpected frontend, or make the union exhaustive so the fallback is provably dead

title: Finding 4 (full form) [T18]: classify the missing-active-run retry condition on a typed signal instead of a substring
technique: reify implicit contract: switch to a typed error code/subclass from agent-spaces, add a characterization test against the real upstream error

title: Finding 5 [T15]: dedupe the aspHome/spec/cwd placement-placeholder triad into a shared placementPlaceholders() helper
technique: extract a shared placementPlaceholders() returning { aspHome: getAspHome(), spec: { spaces: [] }, cwd: '/' } spread into both request builders along with the shared explanatory comment

title: F2 — Collapse parseTerminateRuntimeRequest stringField closure into readOptionalNonEmptyStringField
technique: DE-duplicate -> reuse existing abstraction (collapse one-off closure)

title: F2 (related) — Replace inline optional-non-empty-string projections with readOptionalNonEmptyStringField
technique: DE-duplicate -> reuse existing abstraction

title: F5 — Extract requireOneOf / parseEnumField for repeated enum-membership chains
technique: DE-duplicate -> extract + conditional->dispatch (table)

title: F8 — Extract requireSelector preamble + unify divergent missing-selector error

title: F1 [T15] Extract the shared runtime-terminal-mutation skeleton (finalizeActiveRun + settleInvocation)

title: F3 [T22] Flatten the nested sweep loop in sweepOrphanedBrokerTmuxLeases (extract classifyLeaseSocket)
technique: extract classifyLeaseSocket(entry) -> 'claimed'|'within-grace'|'vanished'|'dead'|'live-orphan' and flatten the loop to a dispatch, keeping the inner stat catch (vanished, no error++) separate from the outer catch (real error, error++)

title: F3 — Duplicated transport derivation for headless/sdk

title: F2 — `as BrokerWindowIdentity` / `as BrokerTmuxLease` casts mask a total-vs-partial guarantee
technique: [T17] partial→total — split BrokerSubstrateAllocation into a discriminated union on presentation.kind so the 'tmux-tui' variant has non-optional tuiWindow/tuiLease, letting the tmux adapter narrow without the two `as` casts.
